mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exchange_rates (rate_no, cur_nm, ttb, tts, deal_bas_r, ntc_dt) VALUES ( SEQ_EXCHANGE_RATES.NEXTVAL, #{cur_nm}, #{ttb}, #{tts}, #{deal_bas_r}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT cur_nm , ttb , tts , deal_bas_r , ntc_dt FROM exchange_rates WHERE cur_nm = #{cur_nm} AND ntc_dt = ( SELECT MAX(ntc_dt) FROM exchange_rates WHERE cur_nm = #{cur_nm} AND TRUNC(ntc_dt) <= TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
